case_title: JONES, BISHOP et al vs. MCCLELLEN, CARLA et al

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, BISHOP JONES, DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLELLEN, CARLA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 70 WEBSTER ST., LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, BUT ACTUAL EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 2/13/95, SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
